genomic_coord_build: chr15:~28,120,472 (GRCh38) — NOT directly stated; inferred as 28,120,403 (rs191109490) + 69 bp, per p.5 'only 69bp from rs12913832'
genotype_or_zygosity: AA or AG (the 'brown' genotype classes); study cohort selected on these
phenotype: Blue eye colour despite AA/AG (discordant); AA/AG canonically predict brown
effect_or_association: Best-known single predictor of blue/brown eye colour; A=ancestral (↑OCA2 expr, brown), G=derived (↓OCA2 expr, blue). Study cohort: all AA/AG (Table 1: AA 21 brown/3 blue; AG 30 brown/40 blue)
population: Norwegian biobank (northern Norway, 2015-2017; presumably unrelated); European ancestry
source_location: Abstract p.1; Intro p.1-2; Table 1 p.2; Methods 2.1 p.2
notes: Coordinate is INFERRED/derived, not printed in paper. Build GRCh38 stated for region (chr15:27,754,870-28,254,863).

variant_protein: not_reported (paper: 'missense OCA2 variant'; amino-acid change not stated)
genotype_or_zygosity: rs74653330:T (minor/variant allele); occurs on rs12913832:A haplotype background (haplotypes A3, A3G, AA3, A3A3, A3G3, G3)
phenotype: Blue eye colour; ALSO lighter skin colour (L*)
effect_or_association: Study group 24/43(56%) carried rs74653330:T+rs121918166:T vs control 5/51(9.8%); assoc. with quantitative(PIE) & categorical eye colour Kruskal-Wallis/Mann-Whitney & Fisher raw p<0.05. Skin: 21/23(91%) rs74653330:T carriers had L*≥median 68.51; A3G individuals sig. lighter (raw p<0.02)
population: Norwegian biobank (northern Norway, 2015-2017; presumably unrelated); European ancestry
source_location: Abstract p.1; Results 3.1 p.4; Results 3.3 p.7; Discussion p.9
notes: Confirmed (not novel) — previously assoc. blue eye in Scandinavians [ref 8] & lighter skin East Asians/Scandinavians [8,15]. Protein/coord NOT given by paper -> flagged for dbSNP resolution.
